parameters: const nickname=args[0];if(!nickname)throw Error('No nickname');const url=https://api.nowhere.sbs/stats/${nickname};const req=Functions.makeHttpRequest({url:url,timeout:9000});const res=await req;if(res.error throw Error('API Error');const d=res.data;if(!d||d.total_games===undefined)throw Error('Bad Data');const packed=(BigInt(d.total_games)<<192n)|(BigInt(d.total_kills)<<128n)|(BigInt(d.total_deaths)<<64n)|BigInt(d.total_assists);return Functions.encodeUint256(packed);
record.name: setSourceCode
